top_signals.title: This Trump-linked startup plans to put humanoid robots in the military
top_signals.summary: With ties to the Trump family,  Foundation Robotics Labs is aiming to deploy humanoid robots in the military in the next 12 to 18 months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
